title: 菊花賞の後に・されど大団円

text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun takes first in the Kikuka Sho.
However, the audience is still wildly impressed
with Fuji Kiseki for attempting a race she has no
aptitude for.

After the race, she asks to participate in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen, a 1,200-meter G1 turf
sprint.

I'm puzzled by her sudden change of heart, but
I'm sure she has a reason.
